Bus Timings

32C Bus Timings Satwa Bus Station to Qusais Bus Station

September 29, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus Route 32C offers a vital connection between Satwa and Qusais in Dubai, serving as a crucial link for both daily commuters and visitors. This route provides a reliable and convenient means of transport across various key areas of the city, facilitating access to major landmarks and residential zones. Whether you’re heading to work, exploring Dubai’s vibrant neighborhoods, or visiting important institutions, Bus Route 32C ensures a seamless journey across the city.

Route Name 32C
Route Description Satwa Bus Station · 3 - Qusais Bus Station · 2
Total Distance Approximately 18.5 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 30 minutes
Operational Hours 04:40 to 23:52 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 5 to AED 8
Official Website RTA Dubai

Bus 32C Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

The bus operates from early morning until late at night, with frequent services to accommodate different schedules. Here are the departure times:

From Satwa Bus Station From Qusais Bus Station

Bus 32C Timetable

For detailed timings, you can visit the official RTA website, or simply follow this link 32C Bus Timings.

Also See: Bus Route 93 in Dubai (Ghubaiba Bus Station · 44-Mall Of The Emirates Bus Station · 3)

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for Bus Route 32C is affordable, with ticket prices typically ranging from AED 5 to 8, depending on the distance traveled. The cost offers a budget-friendly option for commuters and visitors navigating between these key locations.

Bus Booking

Currently, there is no online booking option available for Bus Route 32C. Nol Cards can be loaded with credit at various kiosks and metro stations across Dubai, ensuring a hassle-free payment process.

Bus Route

Bus Route 32C travels between Satwa Bus Station · 3 and Qusais Bus Station · 2, covering an extensive list of stops along the way. Key stops include:

  1. Satwa Bus Station · 3

  2. Satwa, Masjid

  3. Satwa, Post Office

  4. Satwa, Roundabout

  5. Max Metro Landside

  6. Department of Health

  7. Police Stadium

  8. Dubai Civil Aviation College

  9. Bustan Rotana Hotel

  10. Airport Terminal 1, External

  11. Emirates Airlines Headquarters

  12. Emirates Metro

  13. Dubai Municipality Garage

  14. Mawakeb School

  15. Dubai Festival City

  16. Rebat Street

  17. Rebat Street, 2

  18. Umm Ramool, ENOC

  19. Rashidiya, Civil Defence

  20. Beirut Road

  21. Beirut Road, 2

  22. Qusais Police Station

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Qutami Al Suweidi Masjid

  2. Technical School

  3. FEWA

  4. Russian International School

  5. Emirates Housing

  6. New Housing

  7. Lebanese Private School

  8. 76th Street

  9. 76th Street

  10. Public Transport Agency

  11. Dubai Transport Main Office

  12. Muhaisnah 2, Entrance

  13. Al Shirawi Labour Camp

  14. Masjid Hamad Abdul Karim

  15. Qusais Bus Station · 2

Other bus routes in Dubai that you can explore include the 53 bus route, which runs from Gold Souq to International City Bus Station, and the C28 bus route, which travels from Mamzar Beach Park Terminus to Al Baraha Bus Station.

Intersection of Multiple Bus Routes at Al Qusais Bus Station

Al Qusais Bus Station is a vital transit hub in Dubai, where several important bus routes intersect, providing passengers with easy connections across the city. Routes 13A, 13B, 13D, 33, and 34 all meet at this station, offering a wide range of travel options.

These routes cover various key locations within Dubai, making Al Qusais a strategic point for commuters seeking to switch buses efficiently.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

Bus Route 32C covers several notable areas and attractions across Dubai, offering passengers access to key destinations. Here are some points of interest along the route:

  1. Dubai Festival City: A major shopping and entertainment complex featuring a range of retail outlets, dining options, and the Festival City Mall. It’s a popular destination for shopping and leisure.

  2. Dubai Civil Aviation College: An educational institution specializing in aviation studies, contributing to Dubai’s status as an international aviation hub.

  3. Bustan Rotana Hotel: A well-known hotel offering luxury accommodations and services, conveniently located for travelers.

  4. Dubai Municipality Garage: While not a tourist attraction itself, it’s a notable landmark in the city’s public transport infrastructure.

  5. Emirates Airlines Headquarters: The global headquarters of Emirates Airlines, one of the world’s leading airlines, is an important landmark in Dubai’s aviation sector.

  6. Dubai American Academy: An international school known for its high educational standards, attracting families and educational professionals.

  7. Max Metro Landside: Close to the Dubai Metro system, providing easy connections to other parts of the city.

8.

These destinations, combined with the bus’s extensive coverage, make Route 32C a practical choice for exploring Dubai’s diverse offerings and accessing both commercial and leisure facilities.

Journey Experience

The journey on bus route 32C from Satwa Bus Station to Qusais Bus Station offers a long but scenic ride through the heart of Dubai.

As you pass by, you’ll see attractions like the Dubai Frame and Al Fahidi Fort, showcasing the city’s rich heritage. The route also covers areas near the Dubai Creek, where you can spot traditional abras gliding across the water. Ending in Qusais, a quieter residential area, the trip provides a great overview of both the bustling and calmer sides of Dubai.

Read More: Bus Route 33 in Dubai (Qusais Bus Station · 1-Ghubaiba Bus Station · 21)

Traveling with Careem

The price range for this journey is AED 72-87, offering a reliable and affordable transportation option. This service ensures a hassle-free commute, making it easier for residents and visitors to navigate across Dubai.

Bus Route 32C is an essential part of Dubai’s public transport network, providing efficient and cost-effective travel between Satwa and Qusais. With its extensive route and frequent services, it caters to a wide range of travel needs, connecting residents and visitors to important areas and landmarks across the city. Its comprehensive coverage ensures that major destinations are easily accessible, enhancing connectivity and convenience for all passengers.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: September 29, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
